get.summary: Retrieve onboarding information for an institution filtered by tax code and status
get.description: Returns a list of onboarding processes associated with the institution identified by the provided tax code. The results can be filtered by the onboarding status. Each item in the response contains key details such as the onboarding ID, related product, and current status.

attachments.description: Names of the attachments available for the onboarding. Empty list if none.

items.description: Names of the attachments available for the onboarding. Empty list if none.

contractFilename.description: Filename of the signed contract available for download. Null when the onboarding has no signed contract yet (e.g. state TOBEVALIDATED).

requiredDocumentsEnabled.description: True when the (productId, institutionType, origin) triplet has required-documents configured on product-ms, false otherwise.
